name: Marcus Sterling
details: Interested in premium generation-spanning estate trust plans and legacy asset portfolios. Please assign a senior risk analyst.

aiVerdict.inquirySummary: Client wants high-end generation-spanning wealth transfer structures and legacy asset portfolios.
followUpQuestions: What specific multi-signature asset frameworks do you wish to integrate?

name: Helena Vance
details: Need to add a secondary brick-and-mortar storefront property in the French Quarter of New Orleans to my active commercial business liability plan.

aiVerdict.inquirySummary: Requesting expansion of commercial liability to cover a new French Quarter storefront.
followUpQuestions: What is the construction class and year of build for the French Quarter storefront?
Does the property feature automated active fire sprinkler and burglar alarm telemetry?
